SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_THE_CAT_DIED.title: The Cat Died
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_THE_CAT_DIED.descr: Deal {MinDamage:diff()}-{MaxDamage:diff()} damage at random. If that enemy has no more HP than the upper limit, kill it outright.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_THE_CAT_DIED.doomK: Kills this way count as Doom kills.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE.d: Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Whenever your [gold]Script[/gold] ends, draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_FIRE_NOVA.title: Fire Nova
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_FIRE_NOVA.descript: {IfUpgraded:show:On X random enemies, respectively: "|}Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {BurningPower:diff()} [gold]Burning[/gold] to ALL enemies.{IfUpgraded:show:"|}
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_FLAME_STRIKE.title: Flame Strike
Give an [gold]ANYONE[/gold] {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold] and {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. At the start of its next turn, it gains {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_JUGGLE_MULTIPLE_SH: Choose 1 of 3 {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}[gold]Power[/gold] cards from another [gold]Character[/gold] that cost your remaining {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. End your current [gold]Script[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_PHASING.title: Phasing
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_PHASING.descriptio: Gain a random {MinDex}-{MaxDex:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn and at the start of each turn.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_BURNING_LINKED_CAM:
Gain {FuelAbundantPower:diff()} [gold]Fuel Abundant[/gold]. 
[gold]Script[/gold]: When this Script ends, add [gold]Shangfanggu's Sigh[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_TWO_WORD_POET_SCRI:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times to {IfUpgraded:show:ALL enemies|an enemy}.
[gold]Stackable Script[/gold]: At the start of each turn, {IfUpgraded:show:deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times to ALL enemies|deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times to a random enemy}.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_CYBERTRON_STRENGTH: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [gold]Burning[/gold] on ALL enemies.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_ONE_MAN_ONE_CITY.d:
Gain {PlatingPower:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
[gold]Script[/gold]: After your [gold]Plating[/gold] triggers, lose 1 [gold]Plating[/gold] and trigger it 1 additional time.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_DENIED.title: Denied?!
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_DENIED.description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold]. Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. When a debuff you apply is blocked by [gold]Artifact[/gold], return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_WATER_FIRE_INVINCI: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply [gold]Burning[/gold] equal to damage dealt. Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [gold]Burning[/gold] applied.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_TABLE_FLIP.title: Table Flip
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_TABLE_FLIP.descrip: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. At the start of your turn, if no enemy has [gold]Weak[/gold], return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_LOUD_SECRET_PLOT.d: Whenever you play an Attack or Skill that targets ALL enemies or multiple random enemies, while only one enemy can be targeted, that card resolves an additional time.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_FINGER_SNAP_STRIKE: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. At the start of each turn, randomize this card's Energy cost between {MinCost} and {MaxCost}.
